particulars.description: The property being north treviddo farmhouse,. Horningtops, liskeard, PL14 3PS and registered at the land registry with title number CL334785.

The chargor with full title guarantee and as continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities: charges to the chargee by way of legal mortgage the property, the freehold property being (1) all the property known as land at colliford lake park, st neot, liskeard PL14 6PZ registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number cl 266699; (2) all the property known as the camp site, colliford tavern, bodmin registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number cl 289513; (3) all the property known as colliford tavern, colliford lake, st neot, liskeard PL14 6PZ registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number CL38710; and (4) all such right and interest that the chargor may have in the property as more particularly described in the transfer dated on or about the date of this deed between the chargor and the chargee.. Please see charge for more details.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the chargor with full title guarantee charges to the lender: by way of a first legal mortgage, the property, being (1) the freehold property known as land at colliford lake park, st neot, liskeard PL14 6PZ registered at land registry under title number CL266699; (2) the freehold property known as the camp site, colliford tavern, bodmin registered at land registry under title number CL289513; (3) the freehold property known as colliford tavern, colliford lake, st neot, liskeard PL14 6P registered at land registry under title number CL38710; and (4) all such right and interest that the chargor may have in the property as more particularly described in the transfer dated on or about the date of this deed between the chargor and md shamsul arefin.. Please see charge for more details.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender, by way of first legal mortgage, each property specified in schedule 1 (if any).. As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the chargor with full title guarantee charges to the lender by way of first fixed charge: all properties acquired by the chargor in the future; all present and future interests of the chargor not effectively mortgaged or charged under the preceding provisions of this clause 3.2 in, or over, freehold or leasehold property; and all the intellectual property.. Please see charge for more details.

Freehold property known as webbs cottage, pike street, liskeard, PL14 3JQ being all of the land and buildings in title CL220947 including all buildings, fixtures and fittings, the related rights and the goodwill. For further details of properties charged, please refer to the instrument.
Highwood house, barras street, liskeard, PL14 6AD.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender, by way of first legal mortgage, each property specified in schedule 1, being the freehold property known as land on the west side of 24 fore street, liskeard, registered at the land registry with title number CL29718 and the freehold property known as webbs cottage, pike street, liskeard PL14 3JQ registered at the land registry with title number CL220947. As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender by way of first fixed charge: all properties acquired by the borrower in the future; all present and future interests of the borrower not effectively mortgaged or charged under the preceding provisions of this clause 3.2 in, or over, freehold or leasehold property; and all the intellectual property. Please see charge for more details.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender, by way of first legal mortgage, each property specified in schedule 1 (if any).. As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender by way of first fixed charge all properties acquired by the borrower in the future; all present and future interests of the borrower not effectively mortgaged or charged under the preceding provisions of clause 3.2 of the charging document in, or over, freehold or leasehold property; and all the intellectual property.. Please see charge document for more details.
Part of property known as highwood house, barras street, liskeard PL14 4AD as shown edged red on the attached charge plan.
